name: Spanish Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and finely chop the potatoes. Two large potatoes should yield about 3 cups.
2. Crush the red pepper flakes (use if available).
3. Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
4. Add the chopped onion to the pan and sauté until translucent.
5. Pour in the beaten eggs, milk, salt, and pepper. Stir gently.
6. Cook the omelet on low heat until set but still moist.
7. Fold the omelet in half and serve hot.
